# Laurent Vincentelli

Digital & AI Platforms Lead and Refounder. 15+ years of experience building and scaling the platform layer that sits between raw compute and the people who need to use it.
Laurent operates on the principle that the platform layer is the most leveraged investment an organisation can make: a well-built platform multiplies the output of every team that runs on top of it

## Identity

- Full name: Laurent Vincentelli
- Current title: Digital & AI Platforms Lead, Refounder
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/laurentvincentelli/
- GitHub: https://github.com/minsyslvi
- Portfolio: https://laurent.vincentelli.pro/
- Minsys (venture): https://minsys.xyz/

## Current Roles

- Engagement Manager at Deloitte (2023 — Present): Leading Digital & AI Platform engagements across FSI and Telecom sectors. Four pillars: Client Relationship Management, Financial Management, Team Leadership, and Flow & Delivery Oversight.
- Refounder at Minsys (2026 — Present): Venture Building Micro-PE firm. Rewiring Main Street businesses with high-multiple, next-gen business models.
- Founding Partner at WorkshopThinking LLP (2020 — Present): High-intensity Digital & AI workshops for Main Street Business Leaders.
- Founding Partner at Five Forces LLP (2019 — Present): Actionable Competitive Intelligence for Main Street.

## Corporate Career History

- Deloitte | Engagement Manager (2023 — Present)
- IBM | Senior Manager (2019 — 2023): Steered the delivery and adoption of Platform as a Service (PaaS) solutions for Payments, Telco, and Transportation industries.
- Accenture | Manager (2018 — 2019): Led the design and delivery of a retailer's Internal Developer Platform supporting 300+ engineers across E-Commerce, Supply Chain, and Loyalty product squads.
- OVH Cloud | Cloud Solutions Architect (2017 — 2018): Designed GDPR-compliant cloud architecture patterns for financial and public-sector clients.
- Capgemini | Senior Managing Consultant (2015 — 2016): Co-delivered a PaaS platform for mission-critical embedded systems in a Defence and Space programme in a classified environment.
- Cognizant | Senior Consultant (2011 — 2015): Co-built and managed Cloud Platforms (IaaS, PaaS, CaaS) introducing Agile, DevOps, and SRE practices across transformation programmes in Banking and Telecoms.
- GreenSaaS (Fiducial Cloud) | Head of Cloud Engineering (2008 — 2011): One of the first cloud platform providers in France. Designed and built multi-tenant infrastructures from the ground up. Acquired by Fiducial Group.

## Entrepreneurial Ventures

- Minsys | Refounder (2026 — Present): https://minsys.xyz
- WorkshopThinking LLP | Founding Partner (2020 — Present)
- Five Forces LLP | Founding Partner (2019 — Present)
- Turbulences Engineering LLC | Co-Founder (2016 — 2018): Mothballed. A chaos engineering platform for SMBs.
- Zeste LTS Systems LTD | Co-Founder (2014 — 2018): Mothballed. A SecOps platform for Main Street businesses.
- CloudLifters SARL | Founder (2011 — 2015): Exited via M&A at 7x EBITDA. Cloud migration lift-and-shift platform.
- minsys.io | Founder (2010): The prologue of the micro-entrepreneurial journey, now refounded as Minsys.

## Hard Skills & Technical Expertise

- Digital & AI Platform as a Product: Roadmap, backlog, and customer-centric delivery. Turning Internal Developer Platforms and Enterprise AI hubs from IT cost centres into business-velocity engines.
- Extended Enterprise & Ecosystem Management: API gateway architecture, ISV onboarding, partner ecosystems, developer portals, governed revenue channels.
- Hybrid & Distributed Cloud (XaaS): AWS, GCP, Azure, IBM Cloud, Kubernetes ecosystem, GSLB, federated control planes. Greenfield cloud-native builds and sovereign hybrid patterns for regulated industries.
- Software Engineering Practices: DevSecOps, SRE, MLOps, FinOps, API-first, microservices, CI/CD pipelines, event-driven architectures.
- Frameworks & Methodologies: SAFe, Kanban, Scrum (PSM, PSPO), Lean Six Sigma Black Belt, TOGAF, Team Topologies, OKR, Value Stream Mapping.

## Soft Skills & Leadership

- Executive & Stakeholder Communication: C-Suite communication, executive presence, technical storytelling, boardroom fluency.
- Team Leadership & Talent Development: Building, mentoring, and scaling high-performing cross-functional engineering teams around Lean and Agile delivery cultures.
- Cross-functional Collaboration & Alignment: Driving consensus across engineering, product, legal, compliance, and commercial stakeholders.
- Negotiation & Conflict Resolution: Managing competing priorities across multi-vendor, multi-squad environments.
- Entrepreneurial Mindset: Re-founder. Intrapreneur. Builds internal platforms as ventures, not projects. Comfortable with zero-to-one ambiguity.

## Notable Achievements & Case Studies

1. Open Banking Platform (EU Fintech): Built the partner and developer portal for a major EU retail bank. Compressed time-to-first-API-call by 90% (3 weeks to 2 days). Launched 30+ fintech partners on day one — the bank's largest cohort ever.
2. The AI Factory (Energy & Utilities — Global Conglomerate): Designed and delivered the missing platform layers for a global conglomerate's AI factory. Transformed raw GPU infrastructure into a self-service AI marketplace with unified governance and FinOps. Achieved 98% reduction in AI service provisioning time.
3. Insurance-as-a-Service Platform (Insurtech — North America): Transformed a Tier-1 carrier's stalled hyperscaler investment into a live API ecosystem. Cut partner onboarding from 14 weeks to under 3 weeks. Cleared 140+ regulatory controls with zero findings.
4. Internal Developer Platform (Telecom EMEA): Delivered a self-service IDP for a major EMEA telco. Reduced environment provisioning from 18 days to 4 hours. Recovered $9M/year in lost productivity. Achieved 500+ voluntary adopters. Tripled deployment frequency ([3x] velocity).
